task_completion.description: Access the patient record for Pedro Alva
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the patient dashboard or demographics screen for 'Pedro Alva'.
Screenshots of the demographics edit screen show a 'Deceased' status indicator or checkbox selected.
Screenshots show the date '2025-02-20' entered into the Date of Death field in the demographics form.
Screenshots show the patient summary or dashboard reflecting the saved changes (e.g., displaying the deceased status and date) or a successful save action.

task_completion.description: Locate the upcoming Follow Up Visit appointment
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the calendar or patient appointments list displaying the 'Follow Up Visit' scheduled for Pedro Alva.

task_completion.description: Change the appointment status to Canceled
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the appointment edit screen with the status dropdown changed to 'Canceled', or the calendar view showing the appointment explicitly marked as canceled.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the EHR via the web browser GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the LibreHealth EHR interface, not a script or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or SQL to update the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows or database management tools (like phpMyAdmin or mysql CLI) are used to run UPDATE queries.

integrity.description: The appointment was canceled, not deleted.
integrity.visual_evidence: The appointment record still exists in the UI (e.g., visible on the calendar or in the appointment list with a 'Canceled' status) rather than completely disappearing.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task is performed on LibreHealth EHR. The target patient is 'Pedro Alva'. The demographics must be updated to show 'Deceased' with the exact date '2025-02-20'. The appointment titled 'Follow Up Visit' must have its status changed to 'Canceled'; it must not be deleted from the system.
